title: Jeya jeya devi dhakalyakare
lyrics:
Jeya jeya devi dhakalyakare..
Janani sarawathi palayamam..
Amale kamala sara sahkithe..
Arthutha charithe palayamam..
Maadharul mangala gunashale..
<<PAGE:203>>
Mahokya sheelaye palayamam
Girida kundala shishomithe..
Kinnara geethe palayamam ..[ Jeya jeya]
